channel.title: Blogs on Anurag Chaudhary
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Anurag Chaudhary

item.title: 11 Essential Data Mining Algorithms
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to the main algorithm families every data practitioner should recognize, from regression to ensembles.

item.title: Impact of Air Pollution on the Economy
item.description: A refreshed legacy essay on how air pollution affects productivity, healthcare costs, and economic resilience.

item.title: Storytelling, Data, and Dashboards
item.description: A refreshed legacy essay on why dashboards work better when they communicate a clear story instead of just displaying metrics.

item.title: Bias and Variance in Plain English
item.description: A refreshed legacy explainer on underfitting, overfitting, and why machine learning models fail to generalize.

item.title: A Practical Repository of NLP Learning Directions
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to the major areas inside natural language processing and how to think about learning them.

item.title: Using Multiple Python Environments in Jupyter
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to how Jupyter kernels make it possible to work with more than one Python environment.

item.title: What Is GTFS?
item.description: A refreshed legacy explainer on the General Transit Feed Specification and why it matters for transit data products.

item.title: Plotting Maps with Latitude and Longitude
item.description: A refreshed legacy introduction to map-based visualization using coordinate data, geospatial formats, and interactive mapping tools.

item.title: Seven Steps of a Machine Learning Project
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to the main stages of a machine learning workflow, from data collection to prediction.

item.title: Simple Data Visualization Tools
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to choosing approachable visualization tools before jumping into complex dashboard or custom charting stacks.

item.title: Python Libraries for Data Science
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to useful Python libraries for data analysis, machine learning, visualization, and data engineering workflows.

item.title: From Google Data Studio to Looker Studio
item.description: A refreshed legacy dashboarding article on how Google’s reporting tool evolved into Looker Studio and why it still matters.

item.title: Data Processing Command-Line Tools
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to why command-line tools still matter for quick data inspection, transformation, and workflow speed.

item.title: CAP Theorem Explained
item.description: A refreshed legacy explainer on consistency, availability, and partition tolerance in distributed systems.

item.title: NLTK and Natural Language Processing in Python
item.description: A refreshed legacy introduction to natural language processing concepts and how NLTK helps beginners work with text.

item.title: Spark Standalone Mode Explained
item.description: A refreshed legacy introduction to Spark standalone mode and why it remains useful for testing, learning, and simple cluster setups.

item.title: From IPython Notebook to Jupyter
item.description: A refreshed legacy guide to what notebooks are, how the IPython Notebook evolved into Jupyter, and why notebooks still matter.

item.title: Public Datasets for Data Analysis
item.description: A refreshed legacy resource guide to useful public datasets for analytics, machine learning, economics, health, and open data projects.

item.title: Data Science Resources I Still Recommend
item.description: A refreshed legacy resource guide for learning data science through better tools, documentation, and project habits.
